## Environments

> **Replace this.** A list of the environments this repo manages, with the entrypoint for each.

| Environment | Entry point | Backend |

| dev | `terraform/environments/dev/` | s3://example-tfstate-dev |
| staging | `terraform/environments/staging/` | s3://example-tfstate-staging |
| prod | `terraform/environments/prod/` | s3://example-tfstate-prod |

## Conventions specific to this codebase

> Anything an agent could only learn by reading a lot of code, surfaced here.

- Naming: prefix all resources with the environment short code (`prd-`, `stg-`).
- State: never run `terraform apply` from a developer laptop against prod; use the CI pipeline.
- Secrets: pulled from AWS Secrets Manager / GCP Secret Manager / Azure Key Vault at apply time; never in tfvars.
